closed_world.value: Newport mansion during a high society fundraising party
closed_world.quote: the vibrant yellow lights of the Newport mansion illuminated the surrounding property

investigator.value: Detective Reynolds called to Newport crime scene
investigator.quote: Detective Reynolds? C-Chief wants you down to Newport, Rhode Island as soon as you can.

red_herring.value: Potential misdirection through Arthur's personal calls interrupting the case summons, suggesting non-professional distractions

social_world.value: East-coast elite fundraiser society with Wall Street investors and stockbrokers displaying wealth and status
social_world.quote: talk of wall-street investors and stock-markets hung in the air, the atmosphere was that of another successful east-coast fund-raiser

investigator_wound.value: Detective Reynolds torn between personal relationships and professional duty, shown through interrupted meeting with sister
investigator_wound.quote: Arthur shut the phone off and placed it in his jeans pocket. For a moment he pondered what it could be

_meta.title: ebook k darley dancing on strings
